ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number or equivalent */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax profile */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  "filing_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the filing status */,
  "tax_year" TEXT /* Tax year for which the profile is valid */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the tax was filed */,
  "allowance" INTEGER /* Allowance claimed by the employee */,
  "tax_exemptions" TEXT /* Tax exemptions claimed by the employee */,
  "additional_deductions" TEXT /* Additional deductions claimed by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_profiles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_profiles_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_profiles_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_profiles_filing_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_status_id") REFERENCES filing_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay period */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax profile */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the pay period */,
  "pay_periods" INTEGER /* Number of pay periods in the tax year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pay period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pay period */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the pay period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pay_periods_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES tax_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_tax_calculations" (
  "calc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax calculation */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pay period */,
  "gross_income" REAL /* Gross income of the employee */,
  "federal_deduction" REAL /* Federal tax deduction */,
  "provincial_deduction" REAL /* Provincial tax deduction */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income after deductions */,
  "federal_tax_rate" REAL /* Federal tax rate applied */,
  "provincial_tax_rate" REAL /* Provincial tax rate applied */,
  "total_tax_liability" REAL /* Total tax liability for the pay period */,
  "tax_withheld" REAL /* Amount of tax withheld from the employee's pay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_tax_calculations_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES pay_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "tax_regulations" TEXT /* Tax regulations specific to the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "tax_authority" TEXT /* Name of the tax authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "tax_regulations" TEXT /* Tax regulations specific to the province or state */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the province */,
  "tax_authority" TEXT /* Name of the tax authority in the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provinces_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the filing status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filing status */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_statuses_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_statuses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax form */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax profile */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of tax form (e.g., W-2, 1099) */,
  "form_year" TEXT /* Year of the tax form */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the tax form */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the form was uploaded */,
  "form_status" TEXT /* Status of the tax form */,
  "form_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tax form */,
  "form_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the tax form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_forms_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES tax_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax profile */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax form */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES tax_forms ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES tax_profiles ("profile_id")
)
